mapper.insert: insert into member_tbl values ( #{memberId}, #{memberPw}, #{memberName}, null, #{memberEmail}, 3, sysdate, #{memberPostcode}, #{memberAddr}, #{memberDetailAddr}, 0 )
mapper.select: select member_id from member_tbl where member_name = #{memberName} and member_email = #{memberEmail}
mapper.update: update member_tbl set member_pw = #{memberPw} where member_id = #{memberId} and member_email = #{memberEmail}
